## Which Framework / Tool Needs an Adapter?

Name of the framework, library, or LLM runtime:

## Why Is This Adapter Valuable?

Describe the use case and who benefits.

## Adapter Type

- [ ] LLM Runtime (e.g. vLLM, llama.cpp, LM Studio)
- [ ] Agent Framework (e.g. CrewAI, AutoGen, Haystack)
- [ ] Vector Database (e.g. Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus)
- [ ] MCP Tool
- [ ] Other:

## Relevant Links

- Framework docs:
- GitHub repo:

## Would You Be Willing to Build This?

- [ ] Yes, I'll submit a PR
- [ ] I can help review/test
- [ ] No, requesting for the community
